title: Orpiment
description: Another vanilla+ mod adding Wraiths, Amber and Amber caves, Tar, new blocksets, and new slimes.
body:
# Overview
Orpiment is another vanilla-friendly mod that adds Wraiths, Amber and Amber caves, Tar, new blocksets, and new slimes.

# Features
## **Biomes**

## Amber Caves
![Looking into an amber cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31bd66fa78ab0acbfe0357e3ad3b3b6569d185ce.png)
Amber caves are a new underground biome, they spawn uncommonly in warmer temperature biomes.
### Sap
![Looking at a Sap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1b9bf092c509c914c0f803b19ec3e5df7c92270.png)
Saps are a slime variant spawning in Amber Caves. They are by default neutral unless provoked. When spawned they will be filled with random loot, this loot is dropped upon its death. You can also store items in the sap by right clicking it or letting it bounce over them.
### Bucketing
![A bucket of sap in an inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e63e1f2a44f38ceceaa3d5447599d349024a5f5b.png)

Medium Sap's can also be bucketed to move the sap around easily.
### Amber
![Amber nodule in a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6093a223e43da36a9cc32e0c4ba6b87684a94072.png)
Amber can be found in spheres on the walls or floors of the Amber Caves, when breaking an amber block it will drop 1-2 amber chunks.
### Amber Blockset
![All amber blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/830d03cb126659a9c444acd61797f90475467af1.png)
Amber can be crafted into numerous blocks, including pillars, bricks, lamps, and chiseled blocks.

## Cedar Forest
![Looking into a Cedar forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8074a7b815ecd0d45d5748d4a852b9f0792a8b9d.png)
Cedar forests spawn in colder areas near taigas and birch forests.

### Cedar Woodset
![A house made of Cedar wood in a cedar forest clearing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc986269f0ea77dfe9d2b57214074e7821b0eb3f.png)
Cedar wood comes with all the normal wooden blocks.

## **Tar Pits**
![Tar pit in a desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba265559a20ec79ee6e98af2909ac9cc5d59c1f3.png)
Tar pits are small pools found in arid and swamp biomes. And is made up of Tar liquid and Tarred sand.
### Tar Cube
![Tar cubes swimming in tar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d95bb36188918ba1e126c3826071874f29743c11.png)
The Tar Cube spawns in Tar and tar pits, they are aggressive to the player and when hitting the player, the player will be inflicted with the Tarred effect. The Tarred effect worsens movement speed, jump height, swim speed, and more. Small Tar cubes will ignore the player and search for tar liquid, when in tar liquid for a few seconds they will size back up to a medium cube and attack the player again.

## Mini-Bosses

### Wraith
![Fighting a Wraith in the Catacombs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8c572f64a5748e5601669e1759eed327ba89d8f.png)
The Wraith is summoned by right clicking a Wraith altar with a Deepslate seal, Wraith altars spawning in Catacombs structures. It will circle the player doing numerous attacks like charging, firing projectiles, and summoning entities. At 25% health it will start to circle faster and increase its attack pool and speed. When killed it will drop a few bones and Wraith ectoplasm.

## Utilities

### Amber Cage
![Using the amber cage in a desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d26558b0f249f845f721583100a69aa4b87b9f2.png)
The Amber cage is crafted with 8 Amber chunks and 1 Wraith ectoplasm. When right clicked it will freeze the player and spawn 5 high damage projectiles above the players head. Then each subsequent right-click will fire those projectiles 1 by 1 in the direction the player is looking until all 5 have been used.
### Ghost Block
![Ghost blocks floating in the air in a desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/854ae17d1a3aa83ef5f00220388fe7ddd95eb436.png)
Ghost blocks are simple blocks crafted with 4 phantom membranes and 1 Wraith ectoplasm. They can be placed anywhere regardless of if the player is looking at any block, allowing placement in direct air or similar places.
